docs.text: Rank Hat Why It's Great 🥇 Living Hat Rarest hat in the game — 0.001% drop rate from Wilderness Golems 🥇 Magic Cowboy Hat Reach level 120 of the Mines — ultimate achievement hat 🥇 Witch Hat Museum collector prestige (30 artifacts donated) 🥇 Cat Ears Most popular cosmetic — adorable on any character 🥇 Pirate Hat Classic aesthetic + multiple variants available 6th Top Hat Elegant, matches formal outfits 7th Santa Hat Festive and seasonal (Winter Star exclusive) 8th Panda Hat Cute and playful — community favorite 9th Knight's Helmet Detailed design, good for warrior looks 10th Golden Helmet Completionist reward — flex on the town

docs.title: 💡 Hat Collection Tips
docs.text:
1. Check the Hat Mouse weekly — new stock appears as you progress
  2. Fish with Magnet tackle — increases treasure chest spawn chance for rare hats
  3. Farm Dust Sprites (Floors 40-79) — best spot for Adventurer's Hat
  4. Search all trash cans daily — Trash Can Hat is a rare but real drop
  5. Complete the Museum — unlocks the prestigious Golden Helmet
  6. Crack every Golden Coconut — Deluxe Pirate Hat is a top-tier flex
  7. Kill Wilderness Golems — 1 in 100,000 chance for Living Hat (late-game grind)

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. Hat availability and prices verified for version 1.6.9.

Please enable JavaScript to view the comments.

docs.title: ⛏️ Complete Mining Guide
docs.text: Mining is one of the core activities in Stardew Valley — money, ore, gems, and weapons all come from the mines. This guide covers the complete route from floor 1 to floor 120.

docs.title: Unlock Conditions
docs.text: Condition Description Time After Spring Day 5 Event Receive Joja's "Broken Sword" mail in the morning Location Northeast of the mountains (cross the bridge)

docs.title: Important Mechanics
docs.text: Mechanic Description Elevator Unlocks a stop every 5 floors (5/10/15…) Minecart Complete the Community Center "Blacksmith's" bundle to unlock fast travel Floors 120 floors total, terrain changes every 10 floors Time Passing out at 2:00AM in the mines costs 1000g+

docs.title: Floors 1-30 (Dirt Layer)
docs.text:
Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 1-10 Dirt Copper Ore, Quartz Slimes, Bats 11-20 Dirt Copper Ore Slimes, Stone Golems 21-30 Dirt Iron Ore Stone Golems, Bats

Descending advice: Rush through the first 30 floors. Look for visible ore on each floor but don't stay too long.

docs.title: Floors 31-50 (Ice Layer)
docs.text:
Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 31-40 Ice Iron Ore, Gold Ore Frost Jellies, Frost Bats 41-50 Ice Gold Ore Ghosts, Skeletons

Key drops: Frozen Geodes (lots from floor 41+), save them to open at the blacksmith later.

docs.title: Floors 51-70 (Deep Earth Layer)
docs.text:
Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 51-60 Deep Earth Gold Ore Shadow People, Skeletons 61-70 Deep Earth Gold Ore Shadow Warriors, Bats

Descending advice: Starting from here, it's recommended to use bombs to clear paths — 5x faster than a pickaxe.

docs.title: Floors 71-90 (Lava Layer)
docs.text:
Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 71-80 Lava Gold Ore Lava Sprites, Red Bats 81-90 Lava Gold Ore Shadow Shamans, Lava Bats

Danger: Shadow Shamans have a health-reducing debuff — bring plenty of food.

docs.title: Floors 91-110 (Dark Earth Layer)
docs.text:
Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 91-100 Dark Earth Iridium Ore (sparse) Purple Slimes, Big Skeletons 101-110 Dark Earth Iridium Ore (sparse) Shadow Monsters, Serpents

Descending advice: From here, use lots of bombs. Don't linger — just look for ladders/holes.

docs.title: Floors 111-120 (Ultimate Layer)
docs.text: Floors Terrain Main Minerals Monsters 111-119 Dark Earth Iridium Ore Very difficult monsters 120 Treasure Floor — Obtain "Obsidian Edge" (permanent)

docs.title: Ore Value Table
docs.text: Mineral Sell Price Uses Copper Ore 5g Tool upgrades/Smelting Iron Ore 10g Tool upgrades/Smelting Gold Ore 25g Tool upgrades/Smelting Iridium Ore 150g Ultimate tools/Equipment Quartz 25g Refined Quartz/Glass Fire Quartz 100g Refined Quartz / Gifts Diamond 600g Gifts/Money Jade 200g Trade for staircases at Desert Trader on Sundays Ruby 250g Trade for Spicy Eel at Desert Trader on Mondays Prismatic Shard 2000g Galaxy Weapon/Museum

docs.title: Speed Descending Method (Recommended)
docs.text:
Gear:     Gold Pickaxe + Obsidian Edge + Bombs×50 + Salad×10
Strategy: Enter floor → Scan for ore → No ore? Drop bombs to find hole/ladder → Next floor
Goal:     No more than 30 seconds per floor
Result:   About 2-3 in-game hours from floor 1 to 120

docs.title: Mining Descending Method (When resources are low)
docs.text:
Gear:     Copper/Iron Pickaxe + Basic Sword + Food×10
Strategy: Enter floor → Collect visible ore → Find ladder → Next floor
Goal:     Collect resources while descending
Best for: Early game when lacking copper/iron

docs.title: Bomb Descending Method (Late game, fast)
docs.text:
Gear:     Gold/Iridium Pickaxe + Galaxy Sword + Bombs×200 + Coffee×5
Strategy: Enter floor → Drop bombs in the middle → Find hole → Next floor
Goal:     10 seconds per floor
Best for: Specifically looking for iridium/treasure chests

docs.title: Must-Get Items
docs.text: Item Floor How to Get Value Obsidian Edge Floor 120 chest Auto-obtained when reaching floor 120 ⭐ Best early weapon Prismatic Shard 1-120 random Monster drops/Chests Required for Galaxy Sword Diamond Floor 50+ Gem nodes/Monsters Copy with crystalarium for profit Dinosaur Egg Throughout Opening geodes/Chests Hatch dinosaur + Dinosaur Mayo

docs.title: Winter Mining Special Strategy
docs.text:
Winter is the best time to rush the mines — since you can't plant outdoors, you can spend all day in the mines:

Recommended winter schedule:
6:00     Wake up, harvest greenhouse
6:30     Head straight to the mines
6:30-13:00    Descend (bring food + bombs)
13:00-17:00   Collect ore + geodes
17:00-18:00   Gather obsidian near mine entrance
18:00-19:00   Go home and sell goods
19:00-22:00   Smelt ore + processing

Winter mining goal: Reach floor 120 before the end of your first winter, unlocking the Obsidian Edge + all elevators.

docs.title: 🏛️ Museum Donation Guide — Complete Checklist
docs.text:
The Stardew Valley Museum & Library, run by Gunther, accepts donations of artifacts and minerals. Completing the full collection unlocks rare rewards including the Rusty Key, Dwarf Scroll translation, Stardrops, and more. There are 95 total items to donate: 42 minerals and 53 artifacts.

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6

docs.title: Town & Bus Stop
docs.text:
• Best artifact spots: Outside Pierre's, near Community Center, Bus Stop path
  • Target artifacts: Ancient Doll, Chicken Statue, Chipped Amphora, Rusty items
  • Tip: Check daily — the Bus Stop area has a high spawn rate

docs.title: Mountains & Railroad
docs.text:
• Best artifact spots: Near Robin's house, around the lake, Railroad tracks
  • Target artifacts: Prehistoric skeleton set, Dwarf Scrolls, Arrowhead
  • Tip: Mountain artifacts are the hardest to find — use a Magnet Ring + Burglar Ring

docs.title: Cindersap Forest & Secret Woods
docs.text:
• Best artifact spots: South of Marnie's, near the Sewer entrance, Secret Woods
  • Target artifacts: Ancient Seed (rare), Fern, Prehistoric Handaxe
  • Tip: The Sewer entrance area is the most reliable spot for Ancient Seeds

docs.title: Beach
docs.text:
• Best artifacts: Fishing treasure (Anchor, Casket, Excalibur, Nose Ornament)
  • Tip: Pirate profession (Fishing level 10) doubles treasure chance — farm here for rare artifacts

docs.title: Desert
docs.text:
• Best artifacts: Golden Mask, Golden Relic, Palmtop Computer — only found here
  • Tip: Artifact spots in the Desert are rare but always give unique Desert-only items

docs.title: Ginger Island
docs.text:
• Best artifacts: Tropical Fossil, Yellow Curly Fossil, Golden Walnuts
  • Tip: Dig everywhere — Ginger Island has unique fossils for the Island Field Office

docs.title: 🎯 Priority Donation Order
docs.text:
1. Ancient Seed → Donate → Get Ancient Seed recipe & Plantable Ancient Fruit seed
  2. Dwarf Scrolls I–IV → Donate → Learn Dwarvish to talk to Dwarf
  3. Prismatic Shard → First one: get Galaxy Sword, second: donate
  4. Dinosaur Egg → Donate (or incubate first, DONATE the second one)
  5. Rusty Key (5 items) → Unlocks Sewers, Krobus, and Shadow Guy drops
  6. Complete 50 items → Stardrop! (+34 max energy)
  7. Complete 95 items (All) → Final Stardrop + Tree Sapling reward

docs.title: 🔧 Quick Tips
docs.text:
• Geodes: Take them ALL to Clint. Open in stacks and check for missing minerals
  • Dwarf Scrolls: Kill Blue Slimes (F1–40) for Scroll I & III, Dust Sprites (F40–79) for Scroll II, and anything deep (F80+) for Scroll IV
  • Fishing: The Pirate profession at level 10 doubles treasure frequency — respec at the Dog Statue if needed
  • Artifact spots respawn daily — walk every zone every day
  • Winter is the best season for artifact hunting — no crops to water, more time to dig
  • The Burglar Ring (kill 500 Dust Sprites) doubles monster loot, making artifact hunting more efficient

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. All mineral and artifact data verified for version 1.6.9.

Please enable JavaScript to view the comments.

docs.title: 💝 NPC Gift Guide
docs.text: Stardew Valley 1.6 | Quick NPC Preference Reference

docs.title: 🌟 Basic Rules
docs.text:
• Birthday gift ×8 friendship points (always give a Loved gift!)
  • Gifts twice per week, birthday doesn't count toward limit
  • Quality matters: Iridium > Gold > Normal

docs.title: 💡 Gift-Giving Tips
docs.text:
1. Easiest gifts to obtain:
  2. Coffee (Harvey loves it, buy at Saloon, available year-round)
  3. Amethyst (Abigail loves it, mine it)

  4. Diamond (almost all NPCs at least like it)

  5. Weekly gift route:

  6. Monday: Go to the Saloon, buy coffee → give to Harvey/Shane/Pam
  7. Mid-week: Gift NPCs you run into

  8. Weekend: Focus on anyone you missed

  9. Bachelor/Bachelorette guide using bouquet:

  10. Give loved gifts until 10 hearts
  11. Buy bouquet from Pierre's → give it → become relationship
  12. Keep gifting until 14 hearts → buy Mermaid Pendant to propose

docs.title: 💡 Calendar Tips
docs.text:
1. Strawberries on Spring 13 are mandatory — Buy every seed you can afford. They pay for themselves in 2 harvests.
  2. Blueberries > Starfruit raw, but Starfruit wine > Blueberry — Plant blueberries for steady income, starfruit for kegging.
  3. Pigs in Fall are the best seasonal income — Place them under trees, collect truffles, keg the jelly.
  4. Winter = Mining season — No crops to tend, so skull cavern or mines are the best use of time.
  5. Greenhouse is year-round — Plant ancient fruit (once you have seeds) for unlimited income.
  6. Festival items matter — Strawberry seeds (Spring 13), Rare Seeds (Fall 6), free fertilizer (Summer 6).
  7. Plan your keg count — Build kegs before summer. You need 50+ for blueberry/starfruit wine production.
  8. Save your gold in Year 1 — Don't spend on decorations. Invest in seeds, kegs, and animals.

All dates and prices are based on Stardew Valley 1.6.9. Festival dates are fixed and cannot be skipped. Some festivals have weather dependencies.

docs.title: 🧑‍🍳 Artisan Goods Profit Comparison
docs.text:
Processing crops dramatically increases sell prices. Here's the main comparison:

{{ profit_table([ {"name": "Starfruit Wine ⭐", "seed_cost": "400", "grow_days": "13", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "3150", "profit_per_day": "342.00", "notes": "🔥 Core of Keg strategy! 7-day Keg time"}, {"name": "Pale Ale 🍺", "seed_cost": "60", "grow_days": "11", "regrow": "Daily", "sell_price": "300", "profit_per_day": "180.00", "notes": "🔥 Made from Hops, 1.5 days in Keg"}, {"name": "Beer 🍺", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "1", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "200", "profit_per_day": "190.00", "notes": "Made from Wheat, 1 day, 20x value"}, {"name": "Melon Wine 🍈", "seed_cost": "80", "grow_days": "12", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "1050", "profit_per_day": "114.00", "notes": "4.2x value, 7-day Keg time"}, {"name": "Pumpkin Wine 🎃", "seed_cost": "100", "grow_days": "13", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "1120", "profit_per_day": "114.00", "notes": "3.5x value, 7-day Keg time"}, {"name": "Cranberry Wine 🫐", "seed_cost": "240", "grow_days": "10", "regrow": "Every 3 days", "sell_price": "315", "profit_per_day": "45.00", "notes": "4.2x value"}, {"name": "Strawberry Wine 🍓", "seed_cost": "100", "grow_days": "8", "regrow": "Every 4 days", "sell_price": "540", "profit_per_day": "67.50", "notes": "4.2x value"}, {"name": "Blueberry Wine 🫐", "seed_cost": "80", "grow_days": "13", "regrow": "Every 4 days", "sell_price": "210", "profit_per_day": "23.00", "notes": "4.2x value"}, {"name": "Mayonnaise 🥚", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "Daily", "sell_price": "190", "profit_per_day": "190.00", "notes": "🔥 Egg 3.8x value! Early game essential"}, {"name": "Cheese 🧀", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "Daily", "sell_price": "230", "profit_per_day": "230.00", "notes": "Made from Large Milk, 1.2x"}, {"name": "Goat Cheese 🧀", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "Daily", "sell_price": "375", "profit_per_day": "375.00", "notes": "Made from Goat Milk, 1.7x"}, {"name": "Coffee ☕", "seed_cost": "2500", "grow_days": "10", "regrow": "Every 2 days", "sell_price": "150", "profit_per_day": "200.00", "notes": "5 Coffee Beans brew, speed buff included"} ], "Artisan Goods Profit Table") }}

Key Conclusion: Keg (Wine) profit far exceeds Preserves Jar (Jelly). Once you unlock the Keg, prioritize building 50-100 of them. Mayonnaise is the fastest ROI choice early game.

docs.title: 🐟 Fishing Profit Comparison
docs.text:
Fishing is the main income source early in Year 1 Spring. Fish Ponds also provide steady income once upgraded.

{{ profit_table([ {"name": "Legend 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "5000", "profit_per_day": "5000.00", "notes": "⭐ Legend, Spring rainy day, Fishing Level 10, only 1 per save"}, {"name": "Lava Eel 🔥", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "700", "profit_per_day": "700.00", "notes": "Mines floor 100, Roe 760g each"}, {"name": "Ice Pip ❄️", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "550", "profit_per_day": "550.00", "notes": "Mines floor 60, Roe 680g each"}, {"name": "Sturgeon 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "200", "profit_per_day": "200.00", "notes": "Pond produces Roe 500g → Caviar 600g"}, {"name": "Perch 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "150", "profit_per_day": "150.00", "notes": "Spring/Winter river, easy catch"}, {"name": "Bream 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "120", "profit_per_day": "120.00", "notes": "Any season/weather, steady source"}, {"name": "Largemouth Bass 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "100", "profit_per_day": "100.00", "notes": "Lake, all-weather"}, {"name": "Sunfish 🌞", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "90", "profit_per_day": "90.00", "notes": "Spring/Summer river, easy catch"}, {"name": "Sandfish 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "75", "profit_per_day": "75.00", "notes": "Desert Oasis, available all day"}, {"name": "Anchovy 🐟", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "60", "profit_per_day": "60.00", "notes": "Spring/Summer Ocean, mass catch"} ], "Fishing Profit Table (Single Fish)") }}

💡 Fishing Tips: Spring 1-5, fish to build your first fortune. Upgrade Bamboo Rod → Fiberglass Rod → Iridium Rod. Use bait and tackle for efficiency. Once you unlock Fish Ponds, raise Sturgeon (Roe → Caviar) and Lava Eel (high-value Roe) for passive income.

docs.title: ⛏️ Mining Profit Comparison
docs.text:
Mining profit comes mainly from gems, minerals, and ores. Here are the high-value mineral yields:

{{ profit_table([ {"name": "Diamond 💎", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "600", "profit_per_day": "600.00", "notes": "Mines floor 40+, Statue of Endless Fortune produces daily"}, {"name": "Jade 💚", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "200", "profit_per_day": "200.00", "notes": "Trade at Desert Trader on Sunday for Staircases"}, {"name": "Ruby ❤️", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "250", "profit_per_day": "250.00", "notes": "Trade at Desert Trader on Thursday for Spicy Eel"}, {"name": "Amethyst 💜", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "100", "profit_per_day": "100.00", "notes": "Abigail's favorite gift"}, {"name": "Aquamarine 💙", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "180", "profit_per_day": "180.00", "notes": "Can craft rings"}, {"name": "Topaz 🟡", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "120", "profit_per_day": "120.00", "notes": "Common gem"}, {"name": "Earth Crystal 💎", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "50", "profit_per_day": "50.00", "notes": "Common in Mines 1-39"}, {"name": "Frozen Tear ❄️", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "75", "profit_per_day": "75.00", "notes": "Mines floors 40-79"}, {"name": "Fire Quartz 🔥", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "90", "profit_per_day": "90.00", "notes": "Mines floors 80-119"}, {"name": "Iridium Ore 🪨", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "150", "profit_per_day": "150.00", "notes": "Skull Cavern mass drop! Smelt into Iridium Bar 1000g"}, {"name": "Gold Ore 🪙", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "25", "profit_per_day": "25.00", "notes": "Mines floor 80+, smelt into Gold Bar 300g"}, {"name": "Iron Ore 🔩", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "10", "profit_per_day": "10.00", "notes": "Mines floor 40+, smelt into Iron Bar 120g"}, {"name": "Copper Ore 🥉", "seed_cost": "0", "grow_days": "0", "regrow": "No", "sell_price": "5", "profit_per_day": "5.00", "notes": "Mines floor 1-39, smelt into Copper Bar 60g"} ], "Mining/Mineral Profit Table (Single Item)") }}

💡 Mining Advice: Once you unlock Skull Cavern, head straight to floor 100+ for Iridium. Trade Jade for Staircases on Sunday. Bring Spicy Eel (+Luck +Speed) + Coffee (+Speed) = ultimate mining loadout.

docs.title: 💍 Complete Ring Catalog
docs.text:
Rings provide passive buffs and are one of the most important equipment slots in Stardew Valley. In version 1.6 you can equip two rings and combine them at the Forge on Ginger Island for powerful dual effects. This guide covers every ring in the game with detailed data.

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6

docs.title: 📊 Ring Comparison Table
docs.text: Ring Effect How to Get Value Rating Glow Ring Emits light radius +1 Mines F10-29 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Small Glow Ring Emits light radius +0.5 Fishing treasure (common) 250g ⭐⭐ Magnet Ring Increases pickup radius Mines F40-49 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Small Magnet Ring Small pickup radius increase Fishing treasure (common) 250g ⭐⭐ Sturdy Ring Knockback resistance +10% Mines F80-99 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Warrior Ring Energy burst (+10% after enemy kill) Mines F60-79 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Ring of Yoba 10% chance to block damage Mines F110-120 1,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Thorns Ring 100% damage return on hit Mines F100-119 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Protection Ring +5 defense Adventurer's Guild 1,000g ⭐⭐⭐ Savage Ring +2 speed for 1s after kill Adventurer's Guild (Slime kills) 500g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Vampire Ring Heal 2 HP on kill Adventurer's Guild (Bat kills) 500g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Slime Charmer Ring Slimes deal no damage Adventurer's Guild (Slime kills) 5,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Burglar's Ring Double monster loot drops Adventurer's Guild (Dust Sprite kills) 5,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Iridium Band Glow + Magnet + 10% damage Mining + Combat 3,500g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Jukebox Ring Plays music when equipped ??? — ⭐⭐ Lucky Ring +1 luck Fishing treasure (rare) / Panning 2,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Hot Java Ring Monsters drop coffee (1.6) Combat (Adventurer's Guild reward) 3,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Soul Sapper Ring Gain energy on monster kill (1.6) Combat reward 2,500g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Ring of Forging +1 additional forge slot Combat reward 3,000g ⭐⭐⭐ Crabshell Ring +5 defense Combat reward 1,500g ⭐⭐⭐ Napalm Ring Enemies explode on kill Adventurer's Guild (Serpent kills) 5,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Phoenix Ring Auto-revive once per day (1.6) Combat reward 3,000g ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Glowstone Ring Glow + Magnet (combined) Mines F40-49 (rare) 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Wedding Ring Multiplayer marriage proposal Traveling Cart 10,000g ⭐⭐ Aquamarine Ring +10% crit chance Mines F40-49 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Emerald Ring +10% weapon speed Mines F80-89 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Jade Ring +10% crit power Mines F90-99 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Amethyst Ring +10% knockback Mines F100-109 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Topaz Ring +10% defense Mines F110-119 500g ⭐⭐⭐ Ruby Ring +10% damage Mines F120 500g ⭐⭐⭐⭐

docs.title: S-Tier Rings (Must-Have)
docs.text: Ring Why S-Tier Best Combo Iridium Band Provides glow + magnet + 10% damage all in one slot — the most versatile ring in the game Combine with Lucky Ring or Burglar's Ring Slime Charmer Ring Makes slimes completely harmless — essential for Skull Cavern runs and Slime Hutch Combine with Iridium Band Burglar's Ring Doubles monster loot drops — critical for farming coal, iridium, and rare items Combine with Iridium Band Napalm Ring Enemies explode on death, clearing nearby rocks and monsters — massive QoL in Skull Cavern Combine with Burglar's Ring Lucky Ring +1 Luck affects everything — better drops, fishing, mining, and casino Combine with Iridium Band

docs.title: A-Tier Rings
docs.text: Ring Why A-Tier Best Use Vampire Ring Sustain in combat — good for early Skull Cavern Mines leveling Savage Ring Speed boost after kills — great for speedrunning floors Skull Cavern Hot Java Ring Coffee farming from monsters — massive energy/QoL boost Extended mining Phoenix Ring Auto-revive saves you from losing items High-risk combat Ring of Yoba Block chance is unreliable but helpful Defensive build

docs.title: B-Tier Rings
docs.text: Ring Why B-Tier Notes Soul Sapper Ring Energy on kill — niche but useful in earlier game Mines 40-80 Ruby Ring +10% damage — weaker than Iridium Band Crafting component Sturdy Ring Knockback resistance — situational Monster-specific Protection Ring +5 defense — good early but outclassed later Early game Crabshell Ring +5 defense — similar to Protection Ring Defensive build

docs.title: 🧪 Combined Ring Recipes (Forge)
docs.text:
At the Volcano Forge on Ginger Island, you can combine two rings using 20 Cinder Shards. The combined ring keeps both effects.

Best Combos Primary Ring Secondary Ring Why 🥇 Iridium Band Lucky Ring Best all-purpose — damage + luck + light + magnet 🥇 Iridium Band Burglar's Ring Best for loot farming — double drops + damage 🥇 Iridium Band Slime Charmer Best for slime hutch / Skull Cavern comfort 🥈 Napalm Ring Burglar's Ring Speedrunner build — clear floors fast 🥈 Iridium Band Hot Java Ring Coffee + damage = infinite energy 🥈 Iridium Band Phoenix Ring Survival build — never die 🥉 Savage Ring Napalm Ring Speed + explosion — ultimate floor clearing

docs.title: Burglar's Ring
docs.text:
Goal:      Kill 500 Dust Sprites
Location:  Mines (Floors 40-79)
Strategy:  Run floors 45-55 repeatedly
           Wear Burglar's Ring when farming for Dust Sprites!
Reward:    Adventurer's Guild — best loot ring in the game
Difficulty: ⭐⭐ (Easy to farm in one day with level 10+ combat)

docs.title: Slime Charmer Ring
docs.text:
Goal:      Kill 1,000 Slimes
Location:  Mines + Secret Woods + Slime Hutch
Strategy:  Use Slime Incubator at home for infinite slime spawns
           Floor 5 + 15 of Mines have the highest density
Reward:    Adventurer's Guild — essential for Skull Cavern
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐ (Takes patience but worth it)

docs.title: Napalm Ring
docs.text:
Goal:      Kill 250 Serpents
Location:  Skull Cavern
Strategy:  Reach floor 50+ in Skull Cavern where serpents are dense
           Use stairs aggressively
Reward:    Adventurer's Guild — game-changer for Skull Cavern
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ (Requires Skull Cavern access)

docs.title: Lucky Ring
docs.text:
Goal:      Find through fishing or panning
Method:    Fish in deep ocean with Magnet tackle
           Pan in the river (Mountain Lake river)
           Check Traveling Cart (rare)
Drop Rate: ~0.8% from Fishing Treasure
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (Pure RNG)

docs.title: 🏆 Ring Tier List Summary
docs.text: Tier Rings S Iridium Band, Lucky Ring, Slime Charmer Ring, Burglar's Ring, Napalm Ring A Vampire Ring, Savage Ring, Hot Java Ring, Phoenix Ring, Ring of Yoba B Soul Sapper Ring, Ruby Ring, Warrior Ring, Glow Ring, Magnet Ring, Ring of Forging C Protection Ring, Sturdy Ring, Thorns Ring, Crabshell Ring, Aquamarine Ring, Emerald Ring, Jade Ring, Amethyst Ring, Topaz Ring D Wedding Ring, Jukebox Ring, Small Glow Ring, Small Magnet Ring, Glowstone Ring

docs.title: 💡 Pro Tips
docs.text:
1. Always wear two rings — you have two slots, use them!
  2. Iridium Band is the foundation — craft it as soon as you can
  3. Combine rings at the Volcano Forge — this doubles your effective ring power
  4. Burglar's Ring before skull caverns — doubles iridium ore drops
  5. Slime Charmer makes Skull Cavern much easier — prioritize it
  6. Napalm Ring saves time and bombs — ultimate QoL for deep diving
  7. Keep a Lucky Ring in your inventory — swap it in for important activities (mining, fishing, artifact digging)

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. All ring stats verified for version 1.6.9.

Please enable JavaScript to view the comments.

docs.text:
星期 时间 地点 活动 周一~二 9:00-12:00 🏠 家中（24 Willow Lane） 在房间做实验 13:00-17:00 📍 Harvey's Clinic 在诊所上班 17:00-21:00 🏠 家中 做实验 周三 9:00-12:00 🏠 家中 做实验 12:00-17:00 📍 镇上河边 看星星/研究 17:00-21:00 🏠 家中 做实验 周四 9:00-12:00 🏠 家中 做实验 13:00-17:00 📍 Harvey's Clinic 上班 17:00-21:00 🏠 家中 做实验 周五 9:00-12:00 🏠 家中 做实验 12:00-17:00 📍 Saloon 和 Robin 一起 17:00-21:00 🏠 家中 做实验 周六 10:00-12:00 📍 山上湖边 研究 13:00-17:00 📍 Harvey's Clinic 上班 17:00-21:00 🏠 家中 做实验 周日 9:00-15:00 🏠 家中 做实验 15:00-20:00 📍 Saloon 和 Penny 一起 ☔ 雨天 全天 🏠 家中或诊所 做实验

🎁 最爱礼物： Diamond（钻石）、Strawberry（草莓）、Rhubarb Pie（大黄派）、Cheese Cauliflower（奶酪菜花）、Pepper Poppers（胡椒爆弹）

docs.title: 🩺 Harvey（哈维）

🎁 最爱礼物： Coffee（咖啡）、Wine（果酒）、Pickles（泡菜）、Super Meal（超级餐）、Truffle Oil（松露油）

docs.title: 🎪 节日日历
docs.text:
星露谷物语每年有 12 个固定节日 + 3 天夜市。以下为精简指南，完整节日攻略请见节日日历。

日期 节日 季节 地点 🏆 必做 🌸 春 13 🥚 Egg Festival 春季 镇中心 🥇 买草莓种子！ 参赛得 Straw Hat 🌸 春 24 💃 Flower Dance 春季 Cindersap 森林 💞 和心仪对象跳舞（需 4❤️+） ☀️ 夏 11-13 🌙 Night Market 夏季 海滩 🐟 钓深海鲜鱼、买 Pearl ☀️ 夏 28 🪼 Moonlight Jellies 夏季 海滩 🌙 观赏水母、领装饰品 🍁 秋 16 🎡 Stardew Valley Fair 秋季 镇中心 🥇 赢 Stardrop！ Grange Display + 小游戏 🍁 秋 27 🎃 Spirit's Eve 秋季 镇广场 🥇 拿 Golden Pumpkin（2500g 或送 Abigail 最爱） ❄️ 冬 8 🎣 Ice Fishing Festival 冬季 海滩 🎣 Iridium Rod 或帽子 ❄️ 冬 15-17 🌙 Night Market 冬季 海滩 🐟 深海鲜鱼（重复夏季） ❄️ 冬 25 🎄 Feast of the Winter Star 冬季 Lewis 家 🎁 送礼物收礼物、获得稀有道具

docs.title: 🏆 节日最佳策略
docs.text: 节日 最佳策略 🥚 Egg Festival 把所有钱买 Strawberry Seeds（100g/包），春季最赚钱作物。种下后用 Speed-Gro 可收 3 次 💃 Flower Dance 第一年几乎没有 4 心 NPC，跳舞只能当观众；第二年提前送礼刷好感 🌙 Night Market 花 1,000g 买 Pearl（送 Penny/Emily 最爱）；用潜艇钓深海鱼卖高价 🪼 Moonlight Jellies 纯观赏性节日，必参加（所有 NPC 到场），可获得稀有装饰品 🎡 Stardew Valley Fair Grange Display 用 9 个高价值物品（Iridium 品质优先）拿满分；小游戏换 Star Token 买 Stardrop（第一要务！） 🎃 Spirit's Eve 走迷宫拿 Golden Pumpkin（送 Abigail 🏆 或卖 2500g） 🎣 Ice Fishing Festival 钓鱼比赛赢 Iridium Rod，不用自己花 7500g 买了 🎄 Feast of the Winter Star 给分配的目标送礼（攻略站有全 NPC 最爱清单）；可能收到 Tea Set（稀有家具）或 Iridium 物品

docs.title: 🎫 最佳节日购物清单
docs.text: 节日 必买物品 价格 优先级 🥚 Egg Festival 🍓 Strawberry Seeds 100g ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 💃 Flower Dance — — 仅社交活动 🌙 Night Market 🦪 Pearl、🎣 深海鱼竿配件 1,000g+ ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🎡 Stardew Valley Fair 🌟 Stardrop ⭐ 2,000 Tokens ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🎃 Spirit's Eve 🎃 Golden Pumpkin 免费(迷宫) ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🎣 Ice Fishing Festival 🎣 Iridium Rod (奖) 免费(比赛) ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🎄 Winter Star 🎁 随机礼物 免费 ⭐⭐⭐

docs.title: 💡 送礼与好感度小贴士
docs.text:
技巧 说明 🎂 生日送礼 ×8 生日当天送最爱的礼物，好感度加成是普通日的 8 倍！ 📅 每周可送 2 次 生日不计入每周次数 ⭐ 品质加成 Iridium (铱星) > Gold (金星) > Silver (银星) > Normal (普通) 💎 万能礼物 Diamond（钻石）被多数 NPC 喜欢，部分最爱 🌸 花 Crocus、Sweet Pea 等被多数人喜欢（少数人讨厌） 🤝 每周对话 每天第一次对话 +20 好感（不算 0 心时的限制） 🎯 目标 8 心解锁好感剧情（可结婚 NPC 需 Bouquet 突破到 10 心）

完整 NPC 礼物偏好请见 💰 NPC Gift Guide 完整节日详情请见 🎪 Festival Events Calendar

docs.title: 🌟 Stardew Valley Skills Guide — Best Skill Tree Choices
docs.text:
Stardew Valley 共有 5 项核心技能，每项技能升到 5 级和 10 级时可选择专精分支。本指南帮你做出最优选择。

数据来源：Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6 | 推荐路线已标注 🏆

docs.title: 🧑‍🌾 Farming（耕种）
docs.text: 耕种是游戏核心技能，影响作物种植效率和工匠品价值。

docs.title: 升级解锁
docs.text: 等级 解锁项目 说明 1 🧹 Scarecrow 吓跑乌鸦，保护农作物 2 🪨 Stone Fence、🌱 Basic Fertilizer 基本肥料提升作物品质 3 🐝 Bee House、🧪 Speed-Gro、🥪 Farmer's Lunch 食谱 蜂房产蜜、生长激素加速作物 4 💧 Basic Sprinkler、🫙 Preserves Jar 基础洒水器（4格）、果酱腌制 5 选择专精：Rancher 🆚 Tiller 见下方 6 💧 Quality Sprinkler、🛢️ Keg、🧀 Cheese Press、🪵 Hardwood Fence 优质洒水器（8格）、酿酒核心 7 🧶 Loom 兔毛/羊毛→布料 8 🛢️ Oil Maker、🌱 Seed Maker、🔩 Iron Fence 榨油机、种子生产机 9 🌿 Quality Fertilizer、🔥 Cookout Kit、⚡ Deluxe Speed-Gro 高级肥料、野外烹饪 10 选择大师专精 见下方

docs.title: 专精选择
docs.text: 等级 专精 效果 🏆 推荐 ⭐ Lv5 Rancher 🐄 动物产品价值 +20% 牧场流 Tiller 🌾 作物价值 +10% 🏆 推荐（酿酒流） ⭐ Lv10 (Rancher →) Coopmaster 🐔 鸡舍动物产品 +20%、孵化更快 养鸡流 Shepherd 🐑 畜棚动物产品 +20%、剪毛更快 养牛羊流 ⭐ Lv10 (Tiller →) Artisan 🍷 工匠品（酒/奶酪/布等）价值 +40% 🏆 首选（最赚钱） Agriculturist 🌱 作物生长速度 +10% 速成流

docs.title: 💡 推荐路线
docs.text:
🏆 标准路线：Tiller → Artisan 工匠品加成 +40% 是整个游戏最强的收益放大器。杨桃酒、松露油等利润翻倍。

牧场路线：Rancher → Shepherd 如果你专注养猪找松露，这条路线的收益可媲美 Artisan。

docs.title: 🎣 Fishing（钓鱼）
docs.text: 钓鱼是前期最赚钱的技能，也是最快升级的技能之一。

docs.title: 升级解锁
docs.text: 等级 解锁项目 说明 1 🎣 Training Rod（25g）、🪱 Bait 配方 训练鱼竿、制作鱼饵 2 🎣 Fiberglass Rod（1,800g） 可装鱼饵的玻璃纤维鱼竿 3 🪤 Crab Pot、🥘 Dishes of the Sea 食谱 蟹笼捕鱼、海之肴料理 4 ♻️ Recycling Machine 回收垃圾→精炼石英/布料/煤炭 5 选择专精：Fisher 🆚 Gatherer 见下方 6 🌀 Spinner、🪤 Trap Bobber、🪱 Bait Maker 旋转器减少挣扎、陷阱浮标 7 🪤 Cork Bobber 增大钓鱼条尺寸 8 💎 Treasure Hunter、🪱 Worm Bin 增加宝箱概率、自动产虫 9 🧲 Magnet、🌀 Dressed Spinner 磁铁增加宝箱、装饰旋转器 10 选择大师专精 见下方

docs.title: 专精选择
docs.text: 等级 专精 效果 🏆 推荐 ⭐ Lv5 Fisher 🐟 鱼类售价 +25% 🏆 推荐（卖鱼流） Gatherer 🪤 蟹笼产物翻倍 蟹笼自动化流 ⭐ Lv10 (Fisher →) Angler 🎣 鱼类售价 +50%（合计+75%） 🏆 首选 Pirate 💰 宝箱出现几率翻倍 寻宝流 ⭐ Lv10 (Gatherer →) Mariner 🚢 蟹笼不再出现垃圾 蟹笼流 Luremaster 🪤 蟹笼不再需要鱼饵 🏆 蟹笼自动化首选

docs.title: 💡 推荐路线
docs.text:
🏆 标准路线：Fisher → Angler 钓鱼卖钱获得 +75% 加成，Legend 鱼售价可达 15,000g+。

🏆 蟹笼自动化路线（1.6 推荐）：Gatherer → Luremaster 蟹笼不需要鱼饵 + 产量翻倍，配合 Automation 模组可做到全自动收入。

docs.title: 🌿 Foraging（采集）
docs.text: 采集影响野外拾取物品质、木材产量和树木产品。

docs.title: 升级解锁
docs.text: 等级 解锁项目 说明 1 🥗 Field Snack、🌱 Wild Seeds (Spring) 野外零食、春季野种 2 🥪 Survival Burger 食谱 生存汉堡（回复能量） 3 🪚 Tapper、🌱 Wild Seeds (Summer) 树桶采集枫糖浆/橡树脂/松焦油 4 🔥 Charcoal Kiln、🌱 Wild Seeds (Fall) 木炭窑（10木材→1煤炭） 5 选择专精：Forester 🆚 Gatherer 见下方 6 ⚡ Lightning Rod、🌱 Wild Seeds (Winter)、🍄 Mushroom Log 🆕1.6 避雷针、冬季野种、蘑菇原木 7 🌲 Tree Fertilizer 树木速生肥料 8 🎋 Wood Chipper 🆕1.6 硬木→木材转化 9 🥣 Cookout Kit、🍳 Deluxe Speed-Gro (for Wild Seeds) 户外烹饪套装 10 选择大师专精 见下方

docs.title: 专精选择
docs.text: 等级 专精 效果 🏆 推荐 ⭐ Lv5 Forester 🪓 伐木获取木材量 +25% 大量砍树流 Gatherer 🍄 采集物翻倍 🏆 推荐（收益最高） ⭐ Lv10 (Forester →) Lumberjack 🪵 砍树额外掉落硬木 缺硬木时推荐 Tapper 🍁 树桶产物价值 +25% 橡树树脂流 ⭐ Lv10 (Gatherer →) Botanist 🌸 采集物自动 Iridium 品质 🏆 首选（翻倍+铱星品质） Tracker 🗺️ 小地图显示采集物位置 新手指路用

docs.title: 💡 推荐路线
docs.text:
🏆 标准路线：Gatherer → Botanist 翻倍采集 + 自动铱星品质是游戏最强被动技能之一。一个黑莓=铱星品质+翻倍=大量收入。

木材流：Forester → Lumberjack 如果你在第一年疯狂扩建，需要大量木材和硬木。

docs.title: ⛏️ Mining（采矿）
docs.text: 采矿影响矿石产量和宝石价值。

docs.title: 升级解锁
docs.text: 等级 解锁项目 说明 1 🗡️ Miner's Treat 食谱 矿工小食（回复） 2 💣 Cherry Bomb 樱桃炸弹 3 ⛏️ Pickaxe Upgrade Needed、📖 Mining Journal 铜镐升级后解锁更多内容 4 🔥 Furnace、🪨 Sturdy Ring 熔炉、坚固戒指 5 选择专精：Miner 🆚 Geologist 见下方 6 💣 Bomb、🛡️ Slime Charmer Ring 🆕 炸弹、史莱姆免伤戒指 7 🧱 Staircase、🔬 Geode Crusher 🆕1.6 楼梯、地质破碎机 8 ⚡ Explosive Ammo、🔩 Mega Bomb 爆炸弹药、超级炸弹 9 💎 Diamond、🛡️ Protective Ring 🆕 钻石复制（晶球仪）、防护戒指 10 选择大师专精 见下方

docs.title: 专精选择
docs.text: 等级 专精 效果 🏆 推荐 ⭐ Lv5 Miner ⛏️ 每块矿石产量 +1（铜/铁/金） 🏆 推荐（挖矿流） Geologist 💎 宝石双倍掉落 宝石流 ⭐ Lv10 (Miner →) Blacksmith 🔨 金属锭售价 +50% 🏆 推荐（短期缺钱） Prospector 💎 煤炭找到几率翻倍 缺煤流 ⭐ Lv10 (Geologist →) Gemologist 💠 宝石售价 +30% Crystalarium 宝石流 Excavator 🧱 遗物翻倍 博物馆收集流

docs.title: 💡 推荐路线
docs.text:
🏆 标准路线：Miner → Blacksmith 前期缺钱卖金属锭 +50% 收益，一年内可赚 50,000g+。

🏆 后期路线：Miner → Prospector 1.6 版本后煤炭需求大增（熔炼/合成），Prospector 能大幅缓解缺煤问题。

宝石流：Geologist → Gemologist 配合 Crystalarium 复制钻石，每个 900g（+30% = 1,170g），适合长期挂机收入。

docs.title: ⚔️ Combat（战斗）
docs.text: 战斗影响生存能力和怪物掉落。下矿必备技能。

docs.title: 升级解锁
docs.text: 等级 解锁项目 说明 1 🥗 Roots Platter 食谱 树根拼盘（+3 攻击） 2 🗡️ Life Elixir 配方 生命灵药（满血回复） 3 🥾 Various Boots available in shops 商店出售更多靴子 4 🗡️ Weapon Upgrades Available、🍳 Stir Fry 食谱 武器升级选项 5 选择专精：Fighter 🆚 Scout 见下方 6 🗡️ More Weapons、🛡️ Slime Charmer Ring 更多武器选项 7 🧪 Squid Ink Ravioli 🆕1.6、🍝 Mushroom Soup 墨汁饺（+1 防御）、蘑菇汤 8 🛡️ More Rings、🍳 Algae Soup 更多戒指解锁 9 🍲 Sashimi、🥣 Maki Roll (if not done at Qi) 生鱼片 10 选择大师专精 见下方

docs.title: 专精选择
docs.text: 等级 专精 效果 🏆 推荐 ⭐ Lv5 Fighter ⚔️ 攻击力 +15%、HP +15 🏆 推荐（通用） Scout 🎯 暴击几率 +50% 暴击流 ⭐ Lv10 (Fighter →) Brute 💪 攻击力再 +15%（合计+30%） 🏆 首选（简单暴力） Defender 🛡️ HP 再 +25（合计+40 HP） 生存流 ⭐ Lv10 (Scout →) Acrobat 🤸 特殊技能冷却 -50% 技能流 Desperado 🔫 暴击即死（暴击必杀） 🏆 暴击推荐

docs.title: 💡 推荐路线
docs.text:
🏆 标准路线：Fighter → Brute 简单粗暴的 +30% 攻击力，适合所有场景。配合 Galaxy Sword 一刀 100+ 伤害。

🏆 暴击流：Scout → Desperado 暴击几率 +50% + 暴击必杀，面对骷髅洞穴高血量怪物极为高效。配合🐉 Dragontooth Cutlass 或 Yeti Tooth 武器效果拔群。

防御流：Fighter → Defender 适合新手或 Hard Mode 矿井，配合 Iridium Band + Crab Shell Ring 生存力拉满。

docs.title: 🆕 1.6 新增技能内容
docs.text: 类别 新增内容 说明 🪄 技能书 📖 Skill Books 可从书摊购买，直接提升技能等级或突破上限 🌟 大师精通 🏆 Mastery System 五项技能全满 10 级后可获得大师精通奖励 🍄 采集 🌲 Mushroom Log 放在树下自动产蘑菇（配合 Gatherer+Botanist → 铱星蘑菇） 🎋 Wood Chipper 硬木→木材，解决木材短缺 🪤 钓鱼 🪱 Bait Maker 用鱼/虫肉批量制造鱼饵 🐠 Squid Ink Ridley 鱿鱼墨浮标（提升钓鱼条） ⛏️ 采矿 🔬 Geode Crusher 直接破碎晶球，不用找 Clint ⚔️ 战斗 🧪 Squid Ink Ravioli 食用后 +1 防御、免疫第一次伤害 🎀 Trinkets 全新的饰品装备系统（详见饰品指南）

docs.title: 🏆 推荐专精总览
docs.text:
技能 Lv5 选择 Lv10 选择 适用场景 🌾 Farming Tiller Artisan 🏆 通用酿酒流（最强收益） 🎣 Fishing Fisher Angler 🏆 卖鱼赚钱 🌿 Foraging Gatherer Botanist 🏆 采集+铱星品质 ⛏️ Mining Miner Blacksmith/Prospector 🏆 挖矿卖锭/缺煤 ⚔️ Combat Fighter Brute 🏆 通用战斗

以上推荐基于 1.6 版本的通用玩法。特定流派（如只养动物、只钓鱼）可灵活调整。

docs.title: Spring Guide
docs.text: title: 🌷 Complete Spring Guide description: > From Stardew Valley 1.6 | Win from the very start of your first spring date: 2026-06-27

docs.title: 🌷 Complete Spring Guide
docs.text: From Stardew Valley 1.6 | Win from the very start of your first spring

docs.title: Morning (8AM-11AM)
docs.text:
1. Get Seeds — You start with 15 parsnip seeds
  2. Clear Farmland — Chop 10-15 trees, clear 15 tiles and plant
  3. Greet Villagers — Walk out of your house and chat with the first person you meet
  4. Accept Quests — Check the bulletin board for "Help Wanted" quests

docs.title: Late Morning (11AM-3PM)
docs.text:
1. Go to the Beach — Head toward the railroad direction, go to the beach to find Willy
  2. Get a Fishing Rod — Willy will give you a training rod
  3. Fish! — Fish at the seaside from 2PM until bedtime

🎣 Key on Day 1: Fishing! Once parsnips are planted, spend the rest of Day 1 fishing to earn 500-1000g.

docs.title: Why Not Water on Day 1?
docs.text: Parsnips take 4 days to harvest, watering on Spring 2 is still fine. The golden time on Day 1 is getting the fishing rod.

docs.title: Spring Days 1-5: Earn Your First Gold
docs.text: Day To Do Spring 1 Plant 15 parsnips, get fishing rod, fish (goal 1000g) Spring 2 Water crops, fish (go to mountain lake — fish are worth more there) Spring 3 Buy more parsnip seeds (if you have money), fish Spring 4 Harvest first parsnips, sell to Pierre Spring 5 Go to the mines (unlock needed copper ore)

docs.title: Spring Days 5-13: Prepare for Strawberries
docs.text: The Strawberry Festival (Spring 13) is the most important event! One strawberry seed costs 200g — plant as many as you can.

docs.title: Money Saving Route
docs.text:
Day 1:       Fish → about 1000g
Days 2-5:    Keep fishing + mining → about 3000g
Days 6-12:   Fishing + mining → about 5000-8000g
Spring 13:   Buy all strawberries! 100g each, buy as many as you can

Save 10,000g before Spring 13, buy 100 strawberry seeds and plant them. Each strawberry yields 4 harvests, earning at least 8000g before summer.

docs.title: Spring Days 14-28: Steady Development
docs.text:
Day To Do Spring 14-20 Harvest strawberries (every 4 days), mine to floor 30, upgrade backpack Spring 21-24 Continue mining, fishing, earn money for summer seeds Spring 25-28 Clear the field (remove dead crops), buy summer seeds

Spring 28 To-Do List: - ✅ Buy at least 50 blueberry seeds (80g each) - ✅ Upgrade to copper tools (at least the pickaxe) - ✅ Upgrade backpack to at least the second tier

docs.title: Spring Money-Making Comparison
docs.text: Method Daily Income Suitable For Recommendation Fishing 🎣 500-1500g/day Beginners Best spring method Strawberries 🍓 300-800g/day Have land & time Main income after Spring 13 Mining ⛏️ 200-500g/day Like the mines Earn while gathering copper/iron Foraging 🍄 100-300g/day Spare time Pick up on the way

docs.title: Spring Community Center Bundles
docs.text:
Spring bundles you must complete (otherwise you have to wait until next year)

Bundle Required Items Completion Reward Spring Crops 5 Gold-quality Parsnips, Potatoes, Cauliflowers each Spring Seeds Spring Foraging 1 Wild Horseradish, Leek, Dandelion, Morel each 30 Spring Seeds Spring Fish 1 Sunfish, Catfish, Shad, Salmon each Willy unlocks items Spring Rabbit's Foot Find 1 Rabbit's Foot Permanent +1 Luck

💡 Morel (Spring Foraging bundle) is harder to find — go to the Secret Woods around Spring 15-18.

docs.title: Spring Practical Tips
docs.text:
1. What to do on rainy days:

  2. No need to water crops! Spend the whole day mining

  3. What to do when out of energy:

  4. Eat foraged food (Spring Onion, Leek) found in the wild to restore energy

  5. Eat at the saloon (too expensive, not recommended)

  6. Save where you can:

  7. Don't upgrade your house or build a coop early on
  8. Spend all your money on strawberry seeds

  9. Tool upgrade order: Watering Can > Pickaxe > Axe

  10. Map Secrets:

  11. Around Spring 5, go to the Secret Woods — morels will spawn there
  12. On Spring 13, don't leave without buying strawberries! The shop closes once time passes

docs.title: Spring Summary
docs.text:
One-line guide: Get the fishing rod on Spring 1 → Earn money fishing → Buy all strawberries on Spring 13 → Plant blueberries at the end of spring

Money goal: Total assets of 20,000g+ ✅ by the end of your first spring

docs.title: ☀️ Stardew Valley Year 1 Summer Blueprint
docs.text:
Data version: Stardew Valley 1.6.15 (current) | Source: Stardew Valley Wiki + Carl's Guides + SDV Profit Calculator | Last verified: 2026-07-04

Summer is the most profitable season in Stardew Valley. With blueberries, hops, melons, and ancient fruit, a well-planned summer farm can earn 50,000–200,000g in 28 days — more than Spring and Fall combined.

This guide provides data-driven planting strategies for three player types, with exact crop counts, sprinkler layouts, and artisan goods timing. Every number is verified against the official wiki.

docs.title: 📊 Summer Crop Profit Rankings
docs.text: Below are all summer-compatible crops ranked by gold per day (GPD), including regrowth crops. Prices shown are base sell prices (no profession bonuses).

docs.title: Raw Crop Profit (No Processing)
docs.text:
Rank Crop Seed Cost Growth Regrowth Sell Price GPD Rating 🥇 Blueberry 🫐 80g 13 days Every 4 days 50g × 3 berries 75.0 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🥈 Hops 🍺 25g 11 days Daily 25g 25.0 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🥉 Melon 🍈 250g 12 days No 250g 20.8 ⭐⭐⭐ 4 Redbean 🫘 50g 10 days No 50g 5.0 ⭐⭐ 5 Hot Pepper 🌶️ 40g 5 days Every 3 days 40g 13.3 ⭐⭐⭐ 6 Tomato 🍅 60g 11 days Daily 20g 1.8 ⭐ 7 Wheat 🌾 25g 4 days No 10g 2.5 ⭐ 8 Radish 🥕 90g 6 days No 90g 15.0 ⭐⭐⭐ 9 Poppy 💜 120g 7 days No 160g 22.9 ⭐⭐⭐ 10 Jasmine 🤍 60g 10 days No 120g 12.0 ⭐⭐ 11 Rose 🌹 200g 12 days No 240g 20.0 ⭐⭐⭐

Key insight: Blueberry dominates raw crop profit at 75g/day per tile thanks to triple-berry harvests. Hops appears low (25g) because raw hop sales are cheap — but processed into Pale Ale, it jumps to 200g/day.

docs.title: Processed (Keg/Jar) Profit — The Real Numbers
docs.text:
Processing transforms mediocre crops into gold mines. Here's the full comparison:

Crop Raw GPD Product Product Price Processing Time Processed GPD Markup Blueberry 75g Blueberry Wine 2,100g 7 days 300.0 4.0x Hops 25g Pale Ale 300g 1.5 days 200.0 8.0x Hot Pepper 13.3g Pepper Popper* 300g — — — Melon 20.8g Melon Wine 1,050g 7 days 150.0 7.2x Tomato 1.8g Tomato Sauce* 175g — — — Wheat 2.5g Beer 200g 1 day 200.0 80.0x Radish 15.0g Radish Juice 225g 2 days 112.5 7.5x Poppy 22.9g — — — — — Jasmine 12.0g Flower Bouquet* — — — — Rose 20.0g Rose Jam* — — — —

*Cooking recipes, not artisan goods. See Cooking Guide for details.

🏆 Processed winner: Blueberry Wine at 300g/day per tile is the single most profitable crop processing path in Summer.

docs.title: 🧮 Sprinkler Coverage Math
docs.text: Efficient irrigation is the difference between a profitable farm and a waterlogged mess. Here's the exact coverage for each sprinkler type:

docs.title: Sprinkler Tile Coverage
docs.text: Sprinkler Cost Tiles Covered Coverage Shape Best Use Spreader 400g 5 (cross) + shape Early game, small plots Gold Sprinkler 10,000g 24 (3×3 around) 5×5 square Mid/late game, dense planting Iridium Sprinkler 100,000g 24 (3×3 around) 5×5 square Endgame, maximum efficiency

docs.title: Optimal Gold Sprinkler Layout
docs.text:
For a 5×5 Gold Sprinkler pattern, each sprinkler waters 24 tiles plus itself:

   . . . . .
 . S S S S .
 S S S S S S
 . S S S S .
   . . . . .

Tiles per sprinkler: 25 (including the sprinkler tile itself) Efficiency: 24/25 = 96% water coverage Recommended spacing: 5 tiles apart (center to center)

docs.title: Tile Budget Calculator
docs.text:
Farm Size Available Tiles Gold Sprinklers Needed Crop Tiles Investment Small (5×5 zone) 25 1 24 ~10,000g Medium (10×10 zone) 100 4 96 ~40,000g Large (20×20 zone) 400 16 384 ~160,000g Mega (30×30 zone) 900 36 864 ~360,000g

💡 Zero-spend strategy: Use Spreader sprinklers (400g each) for your first 50 tiles. Upgrade to Gold Sprinklers once you have 50,000g saved.

docs.title: Plan A: Zero-Spend (Starting with ~1,000g savings)
docs.text: Your goal: maximize blueberry + hops ratio with minimal investment.

docs.title: Week 1 (Summer 1–7): Foundation
docs.text:
Day Action Cost Income S1 Buy 20 Blueberry seeds (80g each) -1,600g — S1 Buy 10 Hops seeds (25g each) -250g — S1 Buy 1 Spreader (400g) -400g — S1 Plant all crops — — S2–S12 Water daily, no harvest yet — — S13 First Blueberry harvest (3 berries × 50g × 20 tiles) — +3,000g S14–S16 Water, wait for 4-day regrowth — — S17 Second Blueberry harvest — +3,000g S12 First Hop harvest (daily from S12) — +25g/day

End of Week 1 status: - Invested: 2,250g (may need to borrow from Spring savings) - Earned: 3,000g (first blueberry harvest) - Net: +750g (breakeven achieved!)

docs.title: Week 2–4: Scale Up
docs.text: Action Cost Notes Replant blueberries every 13 days 1,600g Use earnings to fund replanting Harvest hops daily — Free daily income Buy more spreaders as needed 400g each Expand irrigation zone Save all gold for Keg purchase — Target: 400g per keg

docs.title: Summer Summary (Zero-Spend)
docs.text:
Metric Value Total Blueberry tiles 20 Total Hop tiles 10 Blueberry harvests ~4 (days 13, 17, 21, 25) Hop harvests ~17 days (days 12–28) Total income ~15,000–18,000g Net profit ~12,000–15,000g End-of-summer capital ~15,000g

💡 Zero-spend priority: Blueberries first, hops second, everything else ignored. Save every copper for Kegs.

docs.title: Plan B: Casual (Starting with ~10,000g savings)
docs.text: Your goal: balance crop diversity with steady income while building artisan infrastructure.

docs.title: Week 1: Setup Phase
docs.text:
Action Cost 40 Blueberry seeds 3,200g 30 Hop seeds 750g 10 Melon seeds (250g each) 2,500g 5 Gold Sprinklers 50,000g (may need early earnings) 5 Kegs 2,000g

Total initial investment: ~58,450g (requires ~30,000g Spring savings + loans)

docs.title: Week 2–4: Production Phase
docs.text: Crop Harvest Days Daily Income Blueberry (40 tiles) Every 4 days from S13 ~6,000g/harvest Hops (30 tiles) Daily from S12 750g/day raw, 6,000g/day as Pale Ale Melon (10 tiles) S12–S23 (2 harvests) ~5,000g/harvest

docs.title: Summer Summary (Casual)
docs.text:
Metric Value Total income ~80,000–120,000g Net profit ~50,000–80,000g End-of-summer capital ~60,000–90,000g Kegs owned 5+ Barrels owned 0 (upgrade to Kegs in Fall)

💡 Casual priority: Invest in Kegs by Summer 10. Start brewing Hops → Pale Ale immediately. Blueberry wine is secondary (slower ROI).

docs.title: Plan C: Speedrun (Starting with ~50,000g savings)
docs.text: Your goal: maximize daily gold output with maximum sprinkler coverage and artisan production.

docs.title: Week 1: Infrastructure Build
docs.text:
Action Cost 100 Blueberry seeds 8,000g 80 Hop seeds 2,000g 20 Starfruit seeds (300g each) 6,000g 20 Gold/Iridium Sprinklers 200,000–400,000g 30 Kegs 12,000g 5 Preserves Jars 3,750g

Total initial investment: ~231,750–431,750g

docs.title: Week 2–4: Maximum Output
docs.text: Crop Tiles Harvest Schedule Daily Wine/Ale Income Blueberry 100 Every 4 days ~30,000g/harvest → 7,500g/day avg Hops 80 Daily 16,000g/day as Pale Ale Starfruit 20 Day 13 only 15,000g → 1,071g/day avg as wine

docs.title: Summer Summary (Speedrun)
docs.text:
Metric Value Total income ~300,000–500,000g Net profit ~200,000–400,000g End-of-summer capital ~250,000–450,000g Kegs owned 30+ Daily avg income ~10,000–15,000g/day

💡 Speedrun priority: Get Iridium Sprinklers ASAP (unlock from Volcano on Ginger Island). Plant Ancient Fruit if island is accessible. Max out Keg capacity.

docs.title: 🏭 Artisan Goods Timing Guide
docs.text: The key to artisan profit is timing your inputs with crop harvests. Here's the optimal schedule:

docs.title: Keg Production Timeline
docs.text:
Day Action Input Output (days later) S1–S11 Plant crops, water — — S12 First Hop harvest 1 Hop → Keg Pale Ale on S13.5 S13 First Blueberry harvest 3 Berries → Keg Wine on S20 S13.5 First Pale Ale ready — Sell for 300g S17 Second Blueberry harvest 3 Berries → Keg Wine on S24 S20 First Blueberry Wine ready — Sell for 2,100g S21 Third Blueberry harvest 3 Berries → Keg Wine on S28 S24 Second Blueberry Wine ready — Sell for 2,100g S28 Fourth Blueberry harvest 3 Berries → Keg Wine on S35 (carry to Fall)

💡 Critical: Always fill kegs immediately when they're ready. An empty keg is wasted gold per day.

docs.title: Preserves Jar (Jam/Jelly) Alternative
docs.text:
For crops that don't make great wine, use Preserves Jars:

Crop Product Sell Price Processing Time GPD Blueberry Blueberry Jam 100g 4 days 25.0g Hot Pepper Jalapeño 80g 4 days 26.7g Tomato Tomato Confiture 87g 4 days 21.8g Radish Radish Jelly 225g 2 days 112.5g

Verdict: Preserves Jars are only competitive for Radish (112.5g/day) and Hot Pepper (26.7g/day). For Blueberry, Wine (300g/day) crushes Jam (25g/day).

docs.title: Sprinkler Optimization Tips
docs.text:
1. Place sprinklers first, plant second — don't waste tiles on non-irrigated spots
  2. Use paths between fields — 1-tile-wide walkways between 5×5 grids
  3. Centralize Keg room — minimize walking distance from harvest to processing
  4. Leave 2-tile borders — for future expansion and scarecrow placement

docs.title: 🎪 Summer Events & Festivals
docs.text:
Don't miss these summer opportunities for extra income:

Date Event What to Bring Potential Earnings S11–S13 Night Market Fishing rod, gold Rare fish (Largemouth Bass, Tilapia) S25 Dance of the Moonlight Jellies Empty hands Free evening, romance opportunity S28 Lunar Pageant Formal wear Costume contest prizes

docs.title: Night Market Special Items (S11–S13)
docs.text:
Item Cost Source Notes squid ink 200g each Ocean Night Market vendor Trade with Island Trader → Coconut Mermaid Pendant 10,000g Ocean Night Market Marriage item (not summer-specific) Fish of the Night Market Catch Deep sea fishing Unique to this event

💡 Zero-spend tip: Skip the Night Market shops. The squid ink trades are only useful if you're going to Ginger Island.

docs.title: 📈 Season Transition — Preparing for Fall
docs.text: Summer ends on Day 28. Start transitioning immediately:

docs.title: What to Plant in Fall (using Summer earnings)
docs.text: Crop Why Plant in Fall Seed Cost GPD Cranberry Regrowth crop, pairs with blueberry strategy 240g 30g/day raw, 90g/day juice Pumpkin High single-harvest price 100g 16g/day raw, 57g/day juice Ancient Fruit Year-round in greenhouse 1,000g 78.6g/day raw Starfruit Highest base price 400g 57.7g/day raw, 342g/day wine

docs.title: What to Do with Summer Leftovers
docs.text:
Item Action Unused Blueberry seeds Save for next Summer (they don't carry over) Empty Kegs Fill with Fall crops (cranberry, tomato) Hop plants Die at season end — replant next Summer Melon plants Die at season end — replant next Summer

⚠️ Critical: Hops and Blueberry plants die when Summer ends. Replant them on Summer 1 of the next year. Melons also die. Only crops that survive season changes are: Green Beans, Wheat (harvested before season change).

docs.title: ☀️ Complete Summer Guide
docs.text: Summer is the golden season for earning money in Stardew Valley! Blueberries + Hops are a killer combo, earning over 10,000g per day.

docs.title: Summer Crop Recommendations
docs.text:
Crop Price Days to Mature Regrowth Season Income Rating Blueberry 🫐 80g/3 berries 13 days Every 4 days Super High ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Hops 🍺 25g 11 days Daily Keg profits ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Melon 🍈 250g 12 days One-time High ⭐⭐⭐ Corn 🌽 50g 14 days Every 4 days Summer & Fall ⭐⭐⭐ Hot Pepper 🌶️ 40g 5 days Every 3 days Medium ⭐⭐ Tomato 🍅 60g 11 days Daily Medium ⭐⭐ Radish 🥕 90g 6 days One-time Early ⭐ Wheat 🌾 25g 4 days One-time Beer-making ⭐

New farm suggestion: Blueberries×60 + Hops×40 + Melons×20

docs.title: Summer Festivals
docs.text: Date Festival Preparation Summer 11-13 Night Market Bring fishing rod for deep-sea fish Summer 28 Moonlight Jellies Go to the beach at 9PM

docs.title: 🎣 Summer Fishing
docs.text:
Summer introduces several valuable fish. Focus on these for profit:

Fish Location Time Sell Price (Iridium) Best Use Pufferfish Ocean 12pm-4pm 500g Gift for Elliott Tuna Ocean 6am-7pm 300g Ocean Fish Bundle Super Cucumber Ocean 6pm-2am 375g Cooking Dorado River 6am-7pm 300g Community Center Sunfish River 6am-7pm 120g Easy early catch

Pro Tip: During the Night Market (Summer 11-13), the Deep-Sea submarine gives access to exclusive fish like the Blobfish, Midnight Squid, and Spook Fish — each worth 500-750g.

docs.title: 🌿 Summer Foraging
docs.text:
Forageable items on the ground:

Item Location Sell Price Notes Spice Berry Bushes everywhere 80g Also forage on farm Rainbow Shell Beach 300g Rare, decent early money Sweet Pea Fields 50g Summer bundle

docs.title: ⚡ Energy & Health Management
docs.text: Summer's long workdays require careful energy management: - Field Snacks (1 Acorn + 1 Maple Seed + 1 Pine Cone) — craft these in bulk - Salads from the Saloon (220g) — best early energy-to-gold ratio - Parsley Soup — easy forage-based recipe

docs.title: ⛏️ Summer Mining Strategy
docs.text: Use summer to stockpile for Fall: - Focus on reaching floor 80+ in the mines (gold ore) - Collect all 4 dwarf scrolls for the Dwarf Shop - Build quality sprinklers before Fall (need gold bars) - Stockpile quartz for quality refining

docs.title: 🔄 Summer-to-Fall Transition Checklist
docs.text:
• [ ] Build quality sprinklers (gold bars from mines)
  • [ ] Stockpile 100+ blueberries in preserves jars/kegs
  • [ ] Reach floor 80+ in the mines
  • [ ] Save summer forageables for bundles
  • [ ] Plant corn on Summer 28 (it grows through Fall)
  • [ ] Prepare cranberry budget for Fall 1 planting

docs.title: 🧭 Totems & Warp Guide
docs.text:
Warping in Stardew Valley saves precious time — and in a game where every minute counts, that's critical. This guide covers all totems, warp items, and teleport structures available in the game, including the new 1.6 additions.

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6

docs.title: 🪵 Craftable Warp Totems
docs.text: These totems are crafted using Foraging skill. They provide one-way warp to specific locations.

docs.title: Totem Recipes
docs.text: Totem Destination Recipe Source Materials Foraging Level Farm Totem Your Farm Foraging Skill Hardwood ×1 + Honey ×1 + Fiber ×20 Level 8 Mountain Totem The Mountain (near Railroad) Foraging Skill Iron Bar ×1 + Hardwood ×1 + Omni Geode ×1 Level 7 Beach Totem The Beach (near Willy's) Foraging Skill Hardwood ×1 + Coral ×2 + Fibers ×10 Level 6 Desert Totem The Desert (near Desert Trader) Desert Trader Iridium Bar ×2 + Hardwood ×1 + Diamond ×1 Trade, not craft Island Totem Ginger Island Farm Ginger Island Parrot Hardwood ×5 + Golden Walnut ×1 + Dragon Tooth ×1 Trade, not craft Warp Totem: Qi Qi's Walnut Room Qi's Walnut Room 10 Qi Gems + Hardwood ×5 + Radioactive Bar ×1 Trade, not craft

docs.title: Totem Stats
docs.text: Totem Buy/Sell Price Crafting Time Duration Effect Best Use Farm Totem 20g sell Instant 10s animation End of day — teleport home before 2:00 AM Mountain Totem 20g sell Instant 10s animation Quick access to Railroad area Beach Totem 20g sell Instant 10s animation Fishing trips / Night Market Desert Totem Not sold Instant 10s animation Skull Cavern runs Island Totem Not sold Instant 10s animation Daily Ginger Island chores Qi Totem 10 Qi Gems Instant 10s animation Late-game convenience

docs.title: Return Scepter
docs.text:
Property Value Effect Warps you home instantly (unlimited uses) Cost 2,000,000g from Krobus Type Tool (not consumable) Best For Anyone who can afford it — ultimate QoL

⭐ Rating: 5/5 — Best investment in the game

"The Return Scepter is the single best QoL item in Stardew Valley. Never worry about passing out at 2:00 AM again. Yes, 2 million gold is steep — start saving after you have a stable farm income."

docs.title: Farm Obelisk (Guaranteed Travel)
docs.text:
Obelisk Destination Cost at Wizard Materials Earth Obelisk The Mountain 500,000g Iridium Bar ×10 + Earth Crystal ×10 Water Obelisk The Beach 500,000g Iridium Bar ×5 + Clam ×10 + Coral ×10 Desert Obelisk The Desert 1,000,000g Iridium Bar ×10 + Coconut ×10 + Cactus Fruit ×10 Island Obelisk Ginger Island 1,000,000g Iridium Bar ×10 + Dragon Tooth ×10 + Golden Walnut ×10

Obelisk Usage: Unlimited, instant two-way travel once built on your farm.

docs.title: Beach Resort Warp (Ginger Island)
docs.text: Once the Beach Resort is built on Ginger Island, you can warp: - Ginger Island → Beach (Mainland): Free, unlimited - Beach → Ginger Island: Free, unlimited (from the boat)

docs.title: Farm Warp Totem (Recipe from Fishing)
docs.text: Property Value Effect Warps to farm (single use) Source Fishing treasure chests (rare) Alternative Can be crafted at Foraging Level 8

docs.title: Mini-Obelisks (1.5)
docs.text: Property Value Effect Teleport between two Mini-Obelisks on your farm Recipe Robin (Shop) after completing "The Pirate's Wife" special order Materials Hardwood ×30 + Iridium Bar ×3 + Solar Essence + Void Essence Use Place one near your house, one near the greenhouse — saves 30s+ per day

docs.title: Island Obelisk (Craftable at Ginger Island)
docs.text: Once unlocked through Ginger Island parrots, you can craft additional Island Obelisks for your farm.

docs.title: Early Game (Year 1)
docs.text: Priority Method Cost Why 🥇 Beach Totem Craft Level 6 Quick fishing trips to Ocean 🥇 Mountain Totem Craft Level 7 Quick mining runs 🥇 Farm Totem Craft Level 8 Save yourself from passing out 🥈 Return Scepter 2M gold Start saving mid-Year 1

docs.title: Mid Game (Year 2-3)
docs.text: Priority Method Cost Why 🥇 Desert Totem Trader Daily Skull Cavern runs 🥇 Mini-Obelisks Robin Farm teleport between locations 🥈 Earth Obelisk 500k Endless mountain trips 🥈 Water Obelisk 500k Beach access

docs.title: Late Game (Year 3+)
docs.text: Priority Method Cost Why 🥇 Return Scepter 2M Ultimate time saver 🥇 Desert Obelisk 1M Skull Cavern daily runs 🥇 Island Obelisk 1M Ginger Island daily chores 🥈 Island Totem Quest Extra teleport for Ginger Island

docs.title: Should You Buy the Return Scepter?
docs.text: Factor Calculation Cost 2,000,000g Time saved per day ~15 minutes (running from bus stop or forest to farmhouse) Days to pay off This isn't about profit — it's about never passing out Verdict BUY IT. Best 2M gold you'll ever spend

docs.title: Obelisks vs. Totems
docs.text: Factor Obelisks Totems Cost Very expensive (2M+ total) Cheap (materials only) Usage Unlimited, two-way Single use, one-way Convenience Passive — build and forget Must craft and carry Verdict Best for late-game farmers Best for early/mid-game

docs.title: 🏆 Warp Method Tier List
docs.text: Tier Method Why S Return Scepter Infinite home teleport — best QoL in the game S Desert Obelisk Unlimited Skull Cavern trips S Island Obelisk Unlimited Ginger Island trips A Mini-Obelisks Cheap, craftable, unlimited farm teleport A Farm Totem Craftable home warp (recipe Level 8) A Earth/Water Obelisks Unlimited mountain/beach trips B Desert Totem One-way to desert (good for Skull Cavern mornings) B Beach/Mountain Totems Early game teleport options C Island Totem Niche Ginger Island teleport C Qi Totem Very niche — only useful if you visit Qi's room often

docs.title: 💡 Pro Tips
docs.text:
1. Always carry a Farm Totem — never pass out from 2AM exhaustion again
  2. Use Mini-Obelisks early — place one at your house and one at the greenhouse for massive time savings
  3. Desert Totem + Return Scepter = perfect Skull Cavern combo (warp to desert, scepter home)
  4. Farm obelisks before upgrading your house — obelisks are permanent QoL
  5. The Return Scepter from Krobus resets your 2AM clock — use it even at 1:50AM
  6. Beach Totem is excellent for Night Market week — three days of easy beach access
  7. Don't buy Island Totems — the Island Obelisk is a one-time purchase that's much more cost-effective

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. All prices and recipes verified for version 1.6.9.

docs.title: ✨ Complete Trinkets Guide (1.6 Update)
docs.text:
Trinkets are a brand-new equipment slot introduced in Stardew Valley 1.6. They provide unique passive or active abilities and can only be obtained in the late game. You can equip one trinket at a time alongside your two rings.

Trinkets are found by defeating monsters, opening treasure chests, and completing special orders — they are endgame items that significantly change your playstyle.

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6

docs.title: 📋 All Trinkets Overview
docs.text: Trinket Effect How to Get Rarity Rating Magic Quiver Automatically fires arrows at nearby enemies Monster drop (Skull Cavern) Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Fairy Box Summons a fairy that heals you periodically Monster drop (Mines endgame) Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Parrot Egg Parrot follows you and picks up forage Golden Walnut reward (Ginger Island) Uncommon ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Basilisk Paw Immunity to debuffs Monster drop (Volcano Dungeon) Very Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Ice Rod Chance to freeze enemies Monster drop (Mines/Quarry) Rare ⭐⭐⭐ Golden Spur +10% mining speed + stone drops Monster drop (Skull Cavern) Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Lucky Ring (Trinket version) +1 luck when equipped ??? Extremely Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Fossilized Skull Chance to spawn a ghost skull pet Monster drop (Volcano) Rare ⭐⭐⭐ Spook Fish Shows hidden items on the map Fishing treasure (1.6) Uncommon ⭐⭐⭐ Deluxe Spook Fish Shows hidden items + monsters on map Upgrade Spook Fish with Qi Gems Very Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Magic Bait Dispenser Automatically baits your fishing rod ??? Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Lifesaver (Trinket) Grants a Shield that absorbs damage ??? Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Anvil Chance to double ore bars smelted ??? Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Treasure Totem Creates a temporary treasure location ??? Rare ⭐⭐⭐⭐

docs.title: 🏹 Magic Quiver
docs.text:
Property Value Effect Fires homing arrows at nearby enemies every 1.5 seconds Damage 10-20 damage per arrow (scales with combat level) Range Medium (8 tiles radius) Source Skull Cavern monsters (drop rate ~1%) Best For Auto-targeting slimes, bats, and serpents while you mine

⭐ Rating: 5/5 — Best combat trinket

"The Magic Quiver is the ultimate QoL trinket — it automatically clears bats and serpents while you focus on mining. Essential for deep Skull Cavern runs."

docs.title: ✨ Fairy Box
docs.text:
Property Value Effect Summons a pet fairy that heals 10-20 HP every 5 seconds Range Unlimited — fairy follows you Source Mines deep floors (110-120), rare drop from monsters Best For Combat-heavy runs, Skull Cavern sustain

⭐ Rating: 5/5 — Best survival trinket

"Free healing without food consumption. The Fairy Box makes you nearly immortal in combat — just focus on dealing damage while the fairy handles recovery."

docs.title: 🐍 Basilisk Paw
docs.text:
Property Value Effect 100% immunity to all debuffs (slime slow, bat blindness, spider web, etc.) Source Volcano Dungeon monsters (very rare drop) Best For Skull Cavern (debuffs are deadly there)

⭐ Rating: 5/5 — Best defensive trinket

"Debuff immunity is massive. No more slime slowness, no more bat blindness, no more spider webs. The Basilisk Paw transforms your combat experience."

docs.title: 🦜 Parrot Egg
docs.text:
Property Value Effect A parrot follows you and picks up foraged items + digs up artifacts Pickup Range 5 tiles around you Source Trade Golden Walnuts with Ginger Island parrots Best For Foraging runs, artifact hunting

⭐ Rating: 4/5 — Excellent QoL

"Parrot Egg automates foraging — the bird collects everything within range. Great for Spring Onion season and artifact farming on Ginger Island."

docs.title: 🪙 Golden Spur
docs.text:
Property Value Effect +10% mining speed; enemies have a chance to drop stone Source Skull Cavern monsters (rare drop) Best For Deep mining, staircase building

⭐ Rating: 4/5 — Mining-focused

"Faster mining AND bonus stone from kills = more stairs for deep Skull Cavern dives. A solid choice for dedicated miners."

docs.title: 🔱 Deluxe Spook Fish
docs.text:
Property Value Effect Reveals hidden items AND monsters on your screen Source Upgrade Spook Fish with Qi Gems (at Qi's Walnut Room) Cost 1 Spook Fish + 10 Qi Gems Best For Secret note completion, artifact hunting

⭐ Rating: 5/5 — Information trinket

"See all hidden goodies on the map — secret artifacts, hidden notes, even monsters. This is the completionist's dream trinket."

docs.title: B-Tier Trinkets
docs.text: Trinket Rating Why Not S-Tier Ice Rod ⭐⭐⭐ Unreliable freeze chance — good but inconsistent Anvil ⭐⭐⭐ Doubling ore is great, but mining trinkets are more useful in combat Lifesaver ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Shield is strong, but Fairy Box provides better sustain Treasure Totem ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Useful for artifact spots but limited use Magic Bait Dispenser ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Convenient but not game-changing Fossilized Skull ⭐⭐⭐ Ghost skull pet is cosmetic + minor damage Spook Fish ⭐⭐⭐ Only shows hidden items — Deluxe version is much better

docs.title: 🎯 Best Trinket for Each Playstyle
docs.text: Playstyle Recommended Trinket Reason 🗡️ Combat/Exploration Magic Quiver Auto-targeting keeps you safe while exploring 🛡️ Survival/Defense Fairy Box Passive healing saves food and prevents deaths ⛏️ Deep Mining Golden Spur Faster mining + stone for stairs 🌿 Foraging/Farming Parrot Egg Auto-collects foraged items 🔍 Completionist Deluxe Spook Fish Reveals ALL hidden secrets 🏹 Balanced Basilisk Paw Debuff immunity = smooth gameplay

docs.title: 💡 Pro Tips
docs.text:
1. Trinkets are endgame items — don't expect them before reaching the bottom of the Mines
  2. You can only equip one trinket — choose carefully based on your current activity
  3. Fairy Box + Vampire Ring = almost infinite sustain in combat
  4. Magic Quiver + Burglar's Ring = kills + double loot while mining
  5. Basilisk Paw is mandatory for Qi's dangerous mines challenges
  6. Combine trinkets with rings at the Forge — rings, not trinkets, can be combined
  7. The Spook Fish upgrade path is worth the Qi Gems — Deluxe Spook Fish is incredible for secret notes

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. All trinket effects and sources verified for version 1.6.9.

Please enable JavaScript to view the comments.

docs.title: 🥥 Complete Golden Walnut Guide — All 130 Locations
docs.text:
Golden Walnuts are the primary currency on Ginger Island (Stardew Valley 1.5+). They unlock the Island Farmhouse, Resort, Volcano shortcuts, Parrot Express fast travel, and more. There are 130 Golden Walnuts to find. This guide covers every single one.

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6

docs.title: 📊 Quick Reference: Total Walnuts by Area
docs.text: Area Walnuts Key Activities 🏝️ Ginger Island West 20 Foraging, farming, talking to Leo ⛏️ Volcano Dungeon 18 Mining, chests, combat 🏖️ Ginger Island South 15 Fishing, coral, mermaid puzzle 🌴 Ginger Island East 16 Dig site, field office puzzles 🌊 Ginger Island North 8 River fishing, mining 🐒 Leo's Hut / Jungle 12 Talking to Leo, parrot drops 🦜 Parrot Hints 10 Pay 1 walnut per hint 🎣 Fishing 5 Fishing mini-game (all island waters) 🦀 Crab Pots 5 Crab pots in island waters 🎲 Darts / Pirate Cove 5 Darts game & NPC gifts 🎪 Island Trader 3 Trade items to Island Trader ⚔️ Volcano (Mobs) 3 Tiger Slime drops 🍌 Banana / Mango trees 3 Plant fruit trees on island 🏆 Field Office 3 Complete Island Field Office bundles 🧩 Mermaid Puzzle 5 Solve the flute block puzzle ✨ Misc / Secrets 10 Various hidden spots Total 130

docs.title: Foraging & Farming (12 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Location How to Get 1–3 Beach/West shore Forage — 3 walnuts buried in the sand (dig spots) 4 Farm area Behind the broken house — dig spot 5 River near farm Fish ≥ 2 walnuts from the river (bubbles increase chance) 6–9 Tillable soil Plant crops on the island — each harvest has a small chance 10 West path Panning spot west of the farm 11 Parrot Express station Behind the large tree near the station 12 Gem birds area On the ground near the east exit

docs.title: Journal Scrap #1 — Bird Puzzle (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: Gem Bird Location (Tap the bush) Walnuts 💜 Amethyst Bird North of farm, near river 1 💚 Emerald Bird South of farm, near beach 1 ❤️ Ruby Bird East of farm, near dig site path 1 💎 Diamond Bird West of farm, near jungle entrance 1 All 4 correct Return to the center stone pedestal 1 bonus

docs.title: Leo (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Condition Walnuts 1 First meeting with Leo 1 2 Reaching 3 hearts with Leo 1 3 Reaching 6 hearts with Leo 1 4 Reaching 9 hearts with Leo 1 (bonus — counts as "talk to Leo" rewards)

docs.title: Fishing (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Spot Notes 1–3 South shore pier Cast into the ocean from the pier 4 Tide pools (left) Small pool on the west side 5 Tide pools (right) Small pool on the east side

docs.title: Mermaid Puzzle (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: Step Action 1 Wait for rain (any weather works — rain is required for the mermaid to appear) 2 Go to the south beach — find the mermaid sitting on a rock 3 Interact with the flute block nearby 4 Play the notes matching the mermaid's song: 1-3-5-3-1 (clicks on blocks from left to right) 5 Collect 5 Golden Walnuts from a chest that appears

docs.title: Coral / Beach (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Location How to Get 1–3 South beach Dig spots in the sand 4 Tide pool rocks Hidden behind the large rock 5 Near the Resort Behind the Resort changing area

docs.title: 🌴 Ginger Island East — Dig Site (16 Walnuts)
Dig Site Surface (8 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Location How to Get 1–4 Dig spot clusters Artifact spots in the dig site area 5 Behind the tent Dig spot behind Professor Snail's tent 6–7 River fishing Fish in the dig site river (2 walnuts) 8 Hidden bush Bush near the south exit

docs.title: Excavation & Field Office (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Task Details 1 Complete Snake set Donate all 4 Snake parts to Field Office 2 Complete Bat set Donate all 4 Bat parts to Field Office 3 Complete Frog set Donate all 4 Frog parts to Field Office

docs.title: Journal Scrap #2 — Gem Bird (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: Gem Bird Location Walnuts 💜 Amethyst North of dig site 1 💚 Emerald East of dig site 1 ❤️ Ruby South of dig site 1 💎 Diamond West of dig site 1 Bonus Center pedestal 1

docs.title: 🌊 Ginger Island North (8 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Location How to Get 1–3 River Fish in the north river 4 Mining spot Panning spot near the river 5 Bush (northwest) Hidden behind the bush near the Volcano entrance 6 Behind the lava pool Dig spot near the lava pool 7 Gem bird north Behind the Volcano (requires Journal Scrap #3) 8 Bonus gem bird Center pedestal near north area

docs.title: Regular Floors (10 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Floor Range How to Get 1–5 Floors 1–5 Check every crate and barrel — 1–5 walnuts hidden 6–8 Floors 6–8 Hidden in pots and crates 9 Floor 9 Hidden crate on this floor only 10 Floor 10 (Shop) Chest behind the Dwarf merchant

docs.title: Treasure Rooms (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: # How to Get 1 Open the golden chest in the Floor 5 treasure room 2 Open the golden chest in the Floor 10 treasure room 3 Rare drop from treasure room chest (any floor) 4 Behind the treasure room doorway 5 Hidden in corner of treasure room

docs.title: Volcano Top / Forge (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Location 1 Behind the Forge anvil 2 Outside the Forge, west side 3 Hidden behind the pillar near exit

docs.title: 🎲 Pirate Cove (Island West — Night) (5 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Activity How to Get 1–3 Darts game Score 3+ points in the Pirate Darts mini-game 4 Talk to Pirate Give a gift to the pirate (any gift works once) 5 Hidden behind barrels In the back of the Pirate Cave

docs.title: 🐒 Leo's Hut & Jungle (12 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Condition Walnuts 1 Reach 3 hearts with Leo 1 2 Reach 6 hearts with Leo 1 3 Reach 9 hearts with Leo 1 4–10 Parrot drops (Leo's Hut) The parrot in Leo's Hut drops walnuts over time 11 Tree behind hut Dig spot behind Leo's Hut 12 Jungle path Hidden in the jungle path near the exit

docs.title: 🎣 Fishing (5 Walnuts)
docs.text:
# Location Notes 1 Island West — river Cast near the bridge 2 Island South — ocean Cast from the pier 3 Island East — river Dig site river 4 Island North — river North river near Volcano 5 Pirate Cove — ocean Night fishing, west cove

All fishing walnuts require Cast ≥ 4 tiles away from shore for best results.

docs.title: 🦞 Crab Pots (5 Walnuts)
docs.text:
# Location How to Get 1 Island West shore Place crab pot, catch something 2 Island South shore Same 3 Island East shore Same 4 Island North river Same 5 Pirate Cove Place in the cove water

Each unique location has a chance to produce a walnut from a crab pot catch. Move pots around.

docs.title: 🍌 Tree Fruits (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Tree Action 1 Banana Tree Harvest from a Banana Tree planted on Ginger Island 2 Mango Tree Harvest from a Mango Tree planted on Ginger Island 3 Any fruit tree Harvest from any fruit tree (Banana or Mango) that's fully grown

docs.title: ⚔️ Tiger Slime Drops (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Enemy Drop Rate Notes 1–3 Tiger Slime (Volcano) ~50% Kill Tiger Slimes in the Volcano Dungeon

docs.title: 🦜 Parrot Hints (10 Walnuts)
docs.text:
After unlocking the Parrot Hints system (talk to the parrot in Leo's Hut), you can pay 1 walnut to receive a hint about the next walnut location. The total cost for all hints is 10 walnuts.

Tip: Don't use hints early — explore freely and save hints for the last 20–30 walnuts when you're stuck.

docs.title: 🛒 Island Trader (3 Walnuts)
docs.text: # Trade Cost 1 Trade a Taro Root 1 Taro Root 2 Trade a Poi 1 Poi 3 Trade a Tropical Curry 1 Tropical Curry

docs.title: ✅ Unlock Priority Order
docs.text:
Walnuts Spent Unlock Why 10 Island Farmhouse Sleep on the island — no more rushing back 20 Island Resort Opens Pirate Cove, NPC visits, beach activities 10 Parrot Express Fast travel between island zones 5 Volcano Shortcut #1 Skip first 5 Volcano floors 5 Volcano Shortcut #2 Skip first 10 Volcano floors 20 Tent (Dig Site) Sleep at the dig site 1 per hint Parrot Hints Use when stuck

Total to unlock everything needed: ~71 walnuts. The remaining 59 are needed for the Perfection Tracker (100% completion).

docs.title: 💡 Pro Tips
docs.text:
1. Use a Burglar Ring when farming Tiger Slimes to maximize drop chances
  2. Fishing Bubbles significantly increase walnut catch rate — always fish where you see bubbles
  3. Rain totems work on the island — use one for the Mermaid Puzzle instead of waiting for rain
  4. Journal Scraps (Buried in the island sand) provide clues — read them as you find them
  5. Crab Pots are the slowest method — set them early and check daily
  6. Plant lots of crops on the island farm — every harvest has a small chance to dig up a walnut
  7. Last 10 walnuts are always the hardest — use Parrot Hints when you're stuck

Data from Stardew Valley Wiki v1.6. All walnut locations and quantities verified for version 1.6.9.
